gcp.androidpublisher.users.create.description: Grant access for a user to the given developer account.

required.description: Required. The developer account to add the user to. Format: developers/{developer}

gcp.androidpublisher.users.patch.description: Updates access for the user to the developer account.

required.description: Required. Resource name for this user, following the pattern "developers/{developer}/users/{email}".

can_come_from.note: [tier 3/field_match] call gcp.androidpublisher.users.list, iterate response["users"][], extract item["name"] → fill {developerId}
[tier 1/exact] call gcp.androidpublisher.users.list, iterate response["users"][], extract item["name"] → fill {userId}

gcp.androidpublisher.users.delete.description: Removes all access for the user to the given developer account.

required.description: Required. The name of the user to delete. Format: developers/{developer}/users/{email}

can_come_from.note: [tier 3/field_match] call gcp.androidpublisher.users.list, iterate response["users"][], extract item["name"] → fill {developerId}
[tier 1/exact] call gcp.androidpublisher.users.list, iterate response["users"][], extract item["name"] → fill {userId}

gcp.androidpublisher.grants.create.description: Grant access for a user to the given package.

required.description: Required. The user which needs permission. Format: developers/{developer}/users/{user}

gcp.androidpublisher.grants.patch.description: Updates access for the user to the given package.

required.description: Required. Resource name for this grant, following the pattern "developers/{developer}/users/{email}/grants/{package_name

can_come_from.note: [tier 3/field_match] call gcp.androidpublisher.users.list, iterate response["users"][], extract item["name"] → fill {developerId}
[tier 1/exact] call gcp.androidpublisher.users.list, iterate response["users"][], extract item["name"] → fill {userId}
[tier 3/field_match] call gcp.androidpublisher.users.list, iterate response["users"][], extract item["name"] → fill {grantId}

gcp.androidpublisher.grants.delete.description: Removes all access for the user to the given package or developer account.

required.description: Required. The name of the grant to delete. Format: developers/{developer}/users/{email}/grants/{package_name}

can_come_from.note: [tier 3/field_match] call gcp.androidpublisher.users.list, iterate response["users"][], extract item["name"] → fill {developerId}
[tier 1/exact] call gcp.androidpublisher.users.list, iterate response["users"][], extract item["name"] → fill {userId}
[tier 3/field_match] call gcp.androidpublisher.users.list, iterate response["users"][], extract item["name"] → fill {grantId}
